sections.html:
Analog Audio · 1970s–1990s

Cassette Mixtape UI

The handmade warmth of a cassette tape label — Sharpie lettering on a creamy sticker, faint ruled lines, and the slightly crooked, deeply personal aesthetic of a mixtape made for someone you care about. Cassette Mixtape UI captures the analog intimacy of physical media, where every label was unique, every song choice was deliberate, and the act of recording was an act of love.

This aesthetic shows up on indie music platforms, lo-fi playlist curators, and personal blog sites that value authenticity over polish. You'll find it on vintage audio equipment shops, podcast landing pages, zine-style publications, and any creative project that wants to feel handmade, warm, and genuinely personal.
